input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.2.1.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

final_answer: Use the format provided and submit the ESF as given in section DR - Document Requirements
